description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 16 hrs 32 mins of coding time, averaging 2 hrs 23 mins per day. His WakaTime activity was mostly in Java, with additional time in Markdown and Other. The data shows activity across 5 projects, but no public GitHub commits, PRs, or new repos were recorded.
